overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a horror game showing a character exploring a dark underground facility. The character moves from a red-lit cave tunnel into industrial basement rooms with pipes and machinery, using a flashlight to navigate the atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cave tunnel with red emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow cave corridor with flashlight, approaching an exit door with red glowing lights

entered.detail: vertical red neon-like light strips illuminating the cave wall
rough textured rock surfaces forming the cave corridor
scattered rocks and rubble on the cave floor
dark door frame leading to another area
red illuminated exit sign above the doorway

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow, claustrophobic cave tunnel illuminated by red emergency lights. The flashlight reveals rough rock walls and debris on the ground as the character approaches a distant exit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: small storage room with wooden furniture

events.description: character enters industrial room from cave tunnel through doorway
character begins descending metal ladder to lower level

agents.ego_description: enters the industrial room, explores the shelves and table, then climbs down the metal ladder

wooden work table with objects on surface
vertical metal ladder leading down to lower level
papers and notices posted on the concrete wall
exposed metal pipes running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the cave into a concrete storage room containing wooden shelves and a work table. After briefly exploring, the character descends a metal ladder into a darker lower level.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial basement corridor with utility pipes

agents.ego_description: walking through dimly lit basement corridors, examining industrial pipes and equipment

wooden shipping pallet on the floor
stacked cardboard boxes in the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character explores a dark industrial basement level with exposed concrete walls and extensive metal piping. The flashlight illuminates red valve wheels and scattered storage items as the character moves through the narrow corridors.

scene_state.functional_zone: utility room with electrical equipment and storage containers

events.description: character examines a collectible item placed on top of a large white container

agents.ego_description: approaching a large container to inspect a collectible item, then examining nearby pipe systems and electrical boxes

small yellow glowing item on top of the container
red metal electrical panel on the wall
safety warning signs posted on the wall
metal grate flooring section near the pipes

segments.scene_description: The character enters a utility room containing a large white storage container with a collectible item on top. After examining the item, the character inspects nearby industrial pipe systems and a red electrical box in the dimly lit space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, red-lit cave tunnel into the depths of a dark industrial basement. It begins by navigating narrow rock walls and debris under emergency lighting before passing through a distant doorway into a concrete storage room filled with wooden shelves and a work table. As the character descends a metal ladder, the scene shifts to a lower level characterized by exposed concrete and extensive metal piping illuminated only by a flashlight. The camera then moves through narrow corridors past red valve wheels and scattered items before finally entering a dimly lit utility room to inspect a white storage container and a red electrical box.
